nasb.text: So the decree went forth that the wise men should be slain; and they looked for Daniel and his friends to kill them.

esv.text: So the decree went out, and the wise men were about to be killed; and they sought Daniel and his companions, to kill them.

cnv.text: 於是王的御旨發出，要把智慧人都殺死；人就尋找但以理和他的同伴，要殺死他們。

ccb.text: 于是，处死智者的谕旨发出，但以理和他的同伴都在被杀之列。
